strengths: Clear identification of three specific real-world objects with explicit provenance and authentic photographs
Well-explained links between each object and the chosen IA prompt, showing how past knowledge has improved
Commentary goes beyond description to justify each objectâs inclusion with evidence (e.g., Aberdeen Group article, historical details)
Critical engagement with multiple perspectives (e.g., ethical and environmental dimensions of the syringe)
Academic rigor demonstrated through a dedicated bibliography and proper contextualization of sources
weaknesses: Some claims (e.g., ethical consensus on syringes) are asserted without sufficient substantiation or data
Occasional overgeneralizations (e.g., âvalue of human health across all culturesâ) reduce nuance
Minor imprecision in language and occasional stylistic issues (e.g., double negations) affect clarity
Lack of in-text citations for some sources and inconsistent bibliographic formatting
Limited explicit reference to TOK terminology (e.g., aesthetic relativism, AOK of ethics) in parts of the commentary
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work meets virtually all requirements for the 7â8 band: three well-contextualized objects, clear and coherent links to the IA prompt, and substantial evidence to justify each inclusion. Photographs and citations authenticate the objects, and critical thinking is evident in the discussion of objectivity, subjectivity and ethics. Minor lapses in precision, occasional overstatements and inconsistent referencing prevent placement in the top band. On balance, an 8 accurately reflects the studentâs strong but not consistently sophisticated performance.

annotations.comment: The table clearly states the word count and selected IA prompt, showing attention to assessment guidelines.
The section header effectively introduces the TOK exhibition and sets a clear academic tone.
The student provides a clear description of the spirit levelâs provenance and operational context, linking it to historical development.
Consider specifying the current practical contexts in which your fatherâs spirit level is used to strengthen real-world relevance.
The use of a published Aberdeen Group article demonstrates strong evidence-based justification of the spirit levelâs improvements.
Include an in-text citation (e.g., author and date) to strengthen academic referencing of the Aberdeen Group article.
Address potential limitations or contexts where the spirit level might still present inaccuracies to acknowledge nuance.
The claim that improvements are âundebatableâ overstates objectivity; acknowledging potential user error would add depth.
Including a high-quality image of the remastered album and its caption enhances authenticity and engagement.
Assign a figure number to the album image and ensure it is referenced in the text for clarity.
The description of remastering lacks specific details about the audio techniques used (e.g., bit-depth, compression).
Provide examples of modern audio techniques (such as dynamic range compression) to illustrate how the remaster was improved.
The commentary effectively connects subjective artistic value to the TOK prompt, illustrating how personal perspectives shape knowledge.
Explicitly reference TOK concepts (e.g., aesthetic relativism) to strengthen the theoretical grounding.
The term âframe of subjectivityâ is not defined; a clearer explanation would improve reader comprehension.
The double negation in âcannot determine or knowâ reduces clarity; consider rephrasing for precision.
The inclusion of a photograph of the syringe and its context as a dental tool grounds the discussion in a concrete real-world setting.
The historical note on the transition from glass to plastic syringes gives clear provenance and supports the improvement argument.
Add an in-text citation for the statistical history (1950s adoption date) to strengthen the historical claim.
The ethical dimension and environmental counterargument demonstrate critical thinking and multiple perspectives.
Integrate data (e.g., annual plastic waste statistics) to substantiate the environmental impact claim.
The assertion that âvalue of human health is one of the most important across all culturesâ risks overgeneralization; consider acknowledging cultural variation.
Support the claim of a majority consensus on medical safety with reference to surveys or WHO guidelines.
Explicitly name the AOK of ethics when discussing moral values to tie the argument to TOK frameworks.
The dedicated bibliographic section clearly organizes sources, demonstrating academic rigor.
The citation for âA Brief History, on the Levelâ has inconsistent formatting; ensure author, title, publisher, and date follow a standard style.
Relying on Wikipedia as a primary source weakens academic credibility; consider locating a peer-reviewed history of the syringe.
Include the Discogs and Aberdeen Group references in the bibliography for completeness and consistency.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
